creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
The freebsd.org pkg builders and ref machines are unable to stay online for more than a day at this point whenever they start any moderate amount of activity. I've run the onboard hardware memory test for 3 days straight with no errors and no lockups.

Looking to start some reasonable amount of debugging to get these machines back into service.  Any advice is welcome.

The panics all seem to look like the following:

  x0:         40b32400
  x1:         40a0b3d8
